description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-drawer` (T2-06) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-drawer/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, placement (left/right/top/bottom) typed, open prop typed, size typed
2. Accessibility — `role="dialog"`, aria-modal, focus trap when open, Escape closes, focus returns to trigger on close, scroll lock on body, axe-core pass
3. Tests — open/close, all placements, focus trap, Escape key, backdrop click to close, scroll lock, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — all placements, with/without footer, nested content
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, slide-in animation, backdrop, CSS parts (panel, header, body, footer, close-btn)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable, JS behaviors for open/close

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-drawer/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-drawer — T2-06 antagonistic quality review

summary:
## Summary: Antagonistic Quality Review of `hx-drawer` (T2-06)

### Changes Implemented
- Created `AUDIT.md` with 15 findings covering all required audit areas

### Files Modified
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-drawer/AUDIT.md` (created)

### Findings by Severity

**P0 (1) — Merge blocked:**
- **P0-01**: Body scroll lock not implemented — `_openDrawer()` never sets `document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'`. Feature spec explicitly requires it. No test covers it.

**P1 (6) — Must fix before ship:**
- **P1-01**: Duplicate `keydown` listener on both `_overlayEl` AND `document` — Tab handler fires twice per keypress, can cause focus jitter
- **P1-02**: Focus trap broken for slotted elements — `shadowRoot?.activeElement` returns `<slot>` element, not the actual focused slotted element; wrap-around never triggers for footer buttons
- **P1-03**: Background content not `aria-hidden` when drawer is open — `aria-modal` alone has inconsistent screen reader support; siblings need explicit `aria-hidden`
- **P1-04**: No Drupal behaviors file — feature spec requires JS behaviors for open/close
- **P1-05**: Animation timeout race condition — `clearTimeout` never called before setting new timeout; rapid open/close causes `hx-after-show` to fire after `hx-after-hide`
- **P1-06**: Dialog has no accessible name when `[slot="label"]` is unpopulated — `aria-labelledby` is conditionally removed via `nothing`, violating WCAG 4.1.2

**P2 (5):** `DrawerSize | string` collapses to `string`, CSS part name `close-button` deviates from spec (`close-btn`), footer relies on UA `[hidden]` without CSS override, `_triggerElement` cast bypasses `instanceof` guard, no Storybook story for nested interactive content.

**P3 (3):** `firstUpdated()` slot detection redundant, `void` promise suppression, unreachable overlay event listener.

### Risks/Blockers Encountered
- The `hx-drawer` component does not exist on this audit worktree branch — it lives on `feature/implement-hx-drawer-t2-slide-in`. The audit was conducted by reading files directly from that branch via `git show`.

### Verification Status
- This task produces only an AUDIT.md — no code to run, build, or test. No Playwright verification applicable.
- `git diff --stat` confirms only `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-drawer/AUDIT.md` was added.

### Notes for Developer
- The implementation branch is `feature/implement-hx-drawer-t2-slide-in`. All P0/P1 fixes must be applied there before merge.
- The most dangerous finding is P1-02 (focus trap for slotted elements) — it will silently fail in tests if tests only test shadow DOM focusable elements (which they do; no test exercises Tab key through slotted footer buttons).
